feature_name: Examples for Reading from a File
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (column1 UInt32, column2 UInt32, column3 UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY column1;
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT * FROM file('test.csv', 'CSV', 'column1 UInt32, column2 UInt32, column3 UInt32');
SELECT AVG(column1) AS avg_column1 FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET column2 = column2 + 1 WHERE column1 > 1;
